form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Horsham over 410m in 23.46. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fifth over 410m at Horsham at Mix 6/7 level. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth on April 13 over 390m at this track behind Juneau Sangria, beaten 4.5 lengths (22.71) in a Bottom Up - Restricted Win. Thereabouts last time others preferred this line-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin and raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time when fifth (22.82) at Ballarat in a T3 Grade 7. Will jump from box 3 for the first time. Tough line-up and places prospects appear best.

form.formComment: Last start finished eighth over 450m at this track, beaten 15 lengths (26.65) behind Paw Oltron in a Mix 6/7 on April 16. Well below best last time but expecting sharp improvement.

form.formComment: Good effort to score just four days ago over 390m at this track by 4.5 lengths in a Maiden. Can make it back to back wins.
